understanding.goal_understanding: Move all selectable pieces onto every goal tile marked '+' at the same time to win the level; multiple goals must all be occupied simultaneously.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: One piece is selected at a time; MOVE_RIGHT shifts it if unblocked, CLICK on a position transports the selected piece there if path is clear (often toggling between open spots like [9,21] and [21,21]); walls/obstacles prevent moves to certain tiles like [35,17], no pushing observed in this run.
